acceptance_criteria.text: Production API fixtures can create email, table, and reviews generic agent runs with LLM analysis and no external dispatch.
Authenticated browser UI smoke can log in as each test user, open /dashboard/agents, select the run result, and see a human-readable run path for each agent type.
gaps: In-app browser typing was blocked by missing virtual clipboard, so local headless Playwright was used.

acceptance_criteria.text: JSON/runtime payload stays hidden behind Technical Journal by default for email, table, and reviews result views.
Temporary production smoke fixtures are cleaned up and verified absent.

commands_for_fresh_verifier: Review raw/prod-*-fixture.txt for API fixture results.
Review raw/browser-generic-ui-smoke.txt and screenshots for UI smoke results.
Review raw/prod-fixtures-cleanup-verify.txt for production cleanup zero counts.
known_gaps: No product code changed in this cycle, so no deploy was needed.
